name: Firnee (Almond & Cardamom Cream Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed pan, combine all ingredients except for 1/2 cup milk and saffron.
Add salt and sugar to the mixture.
2. Heat gently while stirring to dissolve the sugar completely.
3. Blend cornflour into the reserved milk with 1/4 cup water until smooth, then pour this mixture into the warm milk, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add almonds, continuing to stir until the mixture thickens and bubbles. Use a whisk if the mixture becomes lumpy.
5. Stir in ground cardamom to taste and the pounded saffron.
6. Cook on low heat for 5 minutes, allowing the pudding to simmer gently. Stir occasionally.
7. Pour the pudding into individual serving dishes (6 or 8).
8. Sprinkle finely chopped pistachios around the edge of each dish.
9. For traditional presentation, serve the firnee in two plates, decorated with pistachio nuts and cut into wedges.
